rules.section_title: Interactive Notebook: k-NN Example 1
rules.description: Click inside the interactive plot to move the new point. Classification updates automatically.
rules.iframe_title: Interactive k-NN Example 1 Notebook

rules.section_title: Interactive Notebook: k-NN Example 2 (Outlier Sensitivity)
rules.description: Use Manhattan distance, vary k, and toggle the outlier to see how the prediction changes.
rules.iframe_title: Interactive k-NN Example 2 Notebook

rules.section_title: Interactive Notebook: Generalized Sigmoid Function
rules.description: Adjust scale a, slope b, and shift x0 in a/(1+e^{-b(x-x0)}) to see how the sigmoid changes.
rules.iframe_title: Interactive Generalized Sigmoid Function Notebook

rules.section_title: Interactive Notebook: Logistic Models and NLL Landscape
rules.description: Tune the logistic model parameters and dataset settings, then compare the current model against the minimum-NLL solution.
rules.iframe_title: Interactive Logistic Regression and NLL Landscape Notebook

rules.section_title: Interactive Notebook: Sign Function for Classification
rules.description: Explore the sign-based binary classifier with adjustable class centers, spread, and decision boundary.
rules.iframe_title: Interactive Sign Function Classification Notebook

rules.section_title: Interactive Notebook: Linear Separating Hyperplane
rules.description: Adjust the weight vector and bias to see how the hyperplane and its normal vector change in two dimensions.
rules.iframe_title: Interactive Linear Separating Hyperplane Notebook
